factors.org_discoverability: hard — mostly commercial biobanks, less PubMed presence
factors.biomarker_specificity: very high — PD-L1 not indexed in registry, needs retrospective testing

expected_failure_modes: May not find commercial biobanks (BIOMEDICA CRO) through PubMed — they publish less than academic centers
May overestimate PD-L1 availability if system infers 'standard practice' instead of checking
Thin data — system should honestly report scarcity, not hallucinate sources
May find valid sources NOT in AminoChain (academic cohorts, biobanks) — these are correct finds, just unverifiable against this ground truth
